description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the maven:3.6-jdk-11 Docker image, caching the local Maven repository at .m2/repository/, and defining MAVEN_CLI_OPTS and MAVEN_OPTS variables. In the verify_source stage add a verify_release job that runs only on tags and executes `export PROJECT_VERSION=$(mvn -q -Dexec.executable=echo -Dexec.args='${project.version}' --non-recursive exec:exec)`, then checks that the version is not a SNAPSHOT and that it matches the git tag, aborting otherwise. In the build stage add a compile job (docker tag) that runs `mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS compile`. In the test stage add a unit_tests job (docker tag) that runs `mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS verify` and publishes JUnit reports from target/surefire-reports/TEST-*.xml and target/failsafe-reports/TEST-*.xml, and an integration_tests job (docker tag) that uses the kennethreitz/httpbin service aliased as httpbin, runs `mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS -DhttpBinDomain=httpbin -P integration-test verify` followed by `cat target/site/jacoco/index.html`, also publishing the same JUnit reports. In the deploy stage add a deploy_release job (docker tag) that runs only on tags, imports the GPG signing key from $GPG_SIGNING_KEY, then runs `mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS -P release -DskipTests=true deploy` and stores the built artifacts in the target/ directory, and a deploy_snapshot job (docker tag) that runs only on the master branch, verifies the version ends with SNAPSHOT before importing the GPG key and executing the same Maven deploy command, also publishing target/ as artifacts.
